name: Elan Max Cash Everyday Card

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus; sign-up bonus varies by issuing bank

earning_rates.category: Two categories of your choice (5% category options include: Gas/EV, Dining, Grocery, Amazon, Streaming, Home utility, Phone/Internet, etc.)
earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on first $2,000 in combined eligible purchases each quarter on two categories you choose; then 1%

earning_rates.category: One everyday category of your choice (e.g., gas, grocery, dining, streaming, etc.)
earning_rates.notes: 3% unlimited cash back on one everyday category of your choice each quarter (up to $1,500 spend)
1% unlimited cash back on all other eligible purchases

other_benefits.name: Flexible category selection
other_benefits.description: Choose and change your 5% and 3% categories quarterly

notes: Elan issues cards through partner banks (e.g., Associated Bank, Fremont Bank, Credit Unions). The Everyday version earns 3% on one everyday category; the Preferred version earns 5% on two chosen categories and 2% on one everyday category. No sign-up bonus standard, but some issuing banks may offer targeted bonuses.
